title: FEE_STATUS_QUERY
description: Message sent by Referee to a Keeper to confirm fee deposit status for a specific party. The Referee issues this separately to the Actor's Keeper and the Claimant's Keeper. SHOULD be sent before issuing a CONTRIBUTION_RESULT (per RFC-0002 Section 1.2.1).

incident_id.description: Incident identifier to check fee status for.

referee_id.description: Terminal ID of the Referee sending this query.

terminal_id.description: Terminal ID of the party whose deposit status is being queried. The Keeper returns FEE_STATUS_RESULT for this party only.

prior_incident_ids.description: (Optional) UUIDs of prior incidents declared by the Claimant in the ASSESSMENT_REQUEST. The Keeper verifies whether each incident exists with a ASSESSMENT_ISSUED anchor and returns the result in FEE_STATUS_RESULT as verified_prior_incidents.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this message was sent.
